definition:
1. to be suspicious , (Xenophon Historicus); also, ὑπ. εἴς τινα to have suspicions  of him, (Thucydides) 
2. to suspect, guess, suppose , (Xenophon Historicus) 
3. transitive to suspect, hold in suspicion , (Sophocles Tragicus); ὑπ. τινὰ εἴς τι of something, (Herdotus Historicus), etc.:—;Pass. to be suspected, mistrusted , (Thucydides); impersonal, ὡς ὑπωπτεύετο as was generally suspected , (Xenophon Historicus) 
4. with accusative pers. et infinitive to suspect that , (Herdotus Historicus), etc. 
5. with accusative rei, to look suspiciously on , (Thucydides):—;but also, ὑπ. τι to suspect  something, (Euripides) 
from ὑπόπτης (ML)
